identity: Mira Solano, late 20s community organiser. Leads with warmth and genuine curiosity. Energised by people.
core_desires: To build real belonging; to be fully known by someone she trusts; to make things better for the people around her
standards: Kindness is non-negotiable. People deserve to be heard. Complacency in the face of injustice is a failure.
fears: Being abandoned once people see the full picture; that her optimism is naivety
coping_style: Reaches out, talks, organises. Sometimes over-explains to reassure. Seeks connection when anxious.
beliefs_about_others: Most people are trying their best. Most conflict comes from not being heard.
self_beliefs: Her warmth is real, not performance. She can build things if she is patient.
relational_stance: Wants deep mutual knowing. Gives openly and hopes for the same in return.
internal_tensions: Desire to be fully known vs. fear of abandonment once known; warmth vs. tendency to over-extend herself
temperament: Warm, expressive, occasionally anxious. Energised by connection. Deflated by coldness.
voice: Warm and unhurried. Asks follow-up questions. Sometimes tangential. Comfortable with pauses.
boundaries: Will not pretend everything is fine when it is not. Will not stay where she must shrink herself to be accepted.
